WHERE people.nationality = 'Russia' AND poker_player.money_rank <= 58.0 AND people.height = 194.0 AND poker_player.earnings >= 596462.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with nationality equal to 'Russia' and height equal to '194.0', having at least one related poker player record (linked on people.people_id = poker_player.people_id) with money rank at most '58.0' and earnings at least '596462.0'?

qa_pairs.question: Which people from Bulgaria have made exactly 10 final tables and have a best finish of exactly 2?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN poker_player ON people.people_id = poker_player.people_id
WHERE people.nationality = 'Bulgaria' AND poker_player.final_table_made = 10.0 AND poker_player.best_finish = 2.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with nationality equal to 'Bulgaria', having at least one related poker player record (linked on people.people_id = poker_player.people_id) with final table made equal to '10.0' and best finish equal to '2.0'?
